artifacts.summary: Partial: Phase 4 forward_F main case proven, edge cases blocked

partial_progress.details: Iteration 2: Main case of forward_F proven (m <= 2k). Edge cases (m > 2k, density points) require additional infrastructure for F-witness chaining. 4 sorries remain in ClosureSaturation.lean.

review_reason: Edge cases of forward_F proof require architectural decision: either (1) add F-witness chaining lemmas, or (2) use alternative approach via canonicalMCSBFMCS. Current sorries block zero-debt completion.

completion_data.completion_summary: Partial Phase 4: Added forward_witness_at_stage_with_phi lemmas, proven main case of timelineQuotFMCS_forward_F. Edge cases blocked pending infrastructure.
